autofill_prompts.sketch: Transform this sketch into a hyper-realistic photographic scene. Interpret the lines as real-world objects with high-quality textures, cinematic lighting, and natural shadows. Maintain the original composition while adding depth, realistic materials, and 8k resolution details. Scene description: [briefly describe what your sketch shows]
autofill_prompts.inpaint: Edit the masked area: [DESCRIBE THE CHANGE — add, remove, replace, or modify the content]. Seamlessly blend with the surrounding scene, preserving the original lighting, shadows, depth of field, and photo grain.
autofill_prompts.outpaint: Extend the composition of this image. Replace all black or empty spaces with a logical continuation of the background and foreground. Ensure the transition is invisible and the new elements perfectly match the perspective and color palette of the original image. Scene description: [briefly describe what should appear in the expanded areas]

t2i_templates.name: Foggy street deer
t2i_templates.prompt: A silhouetted deer stands on a wet suburban street in thick cool-blue fog. Ahead, a parked car's red taillights reflect on the damp asphalt. Warm orange streetlamps and glowing house windows pierce the cinematic, moody night atmosphere.

t2i_templates.name: Girl in the lavender coat
t2i_templates.prompt: A highly stylized fashion illustration showcasing a character with angular geometric design and exaggeratedly elongated proportions. The figure stands against a pure white background, sporting a large black afro and wearing an oversized lavender coat paired with a pink top and beige trousers. She is carrying a brown tote bag, with the entire composition defined by bold color blocking and a rich digital gouache texture.

t2i_templates.name: Cyber girl with black lipstick
t2i_templates.prompt: A high-fashion beauty portrait of a woman with bold graphic makeup against a light gray background. She wears sharp black winged eyeliner, terracotta eyeshadow, and matte black lipstick. Captured from a low angle with a confident downward gaze, her slicked-back hair reveals minimalist silver earrings. Flawless skin texture and diffused studio lighting emphasize the tight-cropped, avant-garde aesthetic.

t2i_templates.name: 70s sci-fi armchair
t2i_templates.prompt: An armchair faces a luminous window in a deep, void-like environment rendered in a 1970s sci-fi airbrush style. The scene is dominated by rich ultramarine and pitch-black tones, pierced by intense neon orange, vivid crimson, and pale-yellow light from the window. This dramatic lighting creates a sharp contrast, accentuating a granular, stippled texture on the edges of the chair and frame against smooth shadow gradients. Soft plumes of glowing red and yellow mist billow around the base, while brilliant four-point starburst glints radiate from the sharpest highlights.

t2i_templates.name: Red futuristic car
t2i_templates.prompt: A low-angle studio shot captures a futuristic sports coupe bathed in monochromatic crimson light against a seamless red backdrop. The vehicle features a metallic burgundy finish, a glossy monolithic front fascia, and sharp vertical LED headlamps emitting cyan illumination. The prominent foreground wheel showcases deep-dish turbine-style alloy rims. Electric blue ambient light glows through the windshield. A wide-angle lens exaggerates the aggressive lowered stance and sweeping aerodynamic curves, emphasizing the high-contrast aesthetic and vivid reflections.

t2i_templates.name: Girl with the giant hat
t2i_templates.prompt: An avant-garde fashion portrait captures a woman looking back over her shoulder against a muted cool grey gradient background. An enormous black circular hat frames her face in silhouette, complementing her geometric black bangs and dark red lips. She wears a black dress with thin straps, accented by a single oversized flat silver disc earring. The scene features a moody, ethereal atmosphere enhanced by cinematic lighting, a heavy soft focus blur, and a shallow depth of field.

t2i_templates.name: Smeary silhouettes on the ridge
t2i_templates.prompt: Three stark, high-contrast black silhouettes of figures walk along a ridgeline subjected to severe optical distortion and fluid, lateral smearing. The underlying terrain of hills, scattered trees, and foreground flowers is warped into heavy, elongated streaks and abstract curves. Overhead, a heavily distorted, intensely bright sun bleeds into a blown-out white sky filled with dragged cloud shadows and jagged, stretched shapes of birds. The entire monochromatic composition is unified by harsh lighting, heavy film grain, and an experimental darkroom aesthetic that aggressively liquefies every organic shape.

t2i_templates.name: Fox in the wheat
t2i_templates.prompt: A young fox is gently peeking through tall, vibrant green wheat stalks. The fox stands out with its large, fuzzy ears as she holds a direct gaze into the camera. The scene is beautifully illuminated by soft natural light, while a blurred foreground elegantly frames the majestic animal.

t2i_templates.name: Church in the mist
t2i_templates.prompt: A black and white landscape photograph of a steepled church atop a rolling hill, rising from a dense, glowing sea of low-lying fog. Dark trees flank the structure. Behind it, layers of forested ridges recede into misty mountain peaks under an overcast sky. The scene features profound atmospheric depth, contrasting the bright, sweeping mist against the sharply silhouetted terrain.

t2i_templates.name: Queen in the green dress
t2i_templates.prompt: A high-fashion portrait of a statuesque model with a close buzz cut against a stark white studio background. She wears an emerald green halter dress entirely covered in layered, rectangular fabric fringes. One arm crosses her torso, fingers resting on the opposite bare shoulder. She is adorned with cascading hammered gold earrings and a wide matching gold cuff bracelet, both embedded with tiny jewels. Dramatic lighting casts rich shadows across her collarbones and facial structure, highlighting glossy dark lips and the shimmering texture of the gold jewelry. The low-angle perspective emphasizes a regal, commanding presence.

t2i_templates.name: Mountains with fog and cabins
t2i_templates.prompt: Rolling golden-brown hills bathed in warm, diffused light emerge through thick, low-lying morning mist. A solitary slender tree stands in the hazy foreground valley, while two small rustic wooden cabins rest on a gentle ridge to the right. A dense horizontal band of white clouds separates the lower pastures from towering, jagged mountain peaks dominating the background. The massive rocky summits, lightly dusted with snow, fade into a pale, hazy sky. The wide-angle landscape photography emphasizes profound atmospheric depth, ethereal cinematic lighting, and a soft natural color palette contrasting the golden-ochre foreground with the cool, muted grey and blue distant peaks.

items.label: Close-up
items.prompt: Shift to a tight close-up on the subject. Crop the frame closely to focus on the main details while keeping the background sharp and visible. Ensure all colors, textures, and environmental elements from the original scene remain identical and perfectly clear, simply viewed from a much shorter camera distance.

items.label: Wide-angle
items.prompt: Switch to a wide-angle lens while keeping the subject at the center. Reveal more of the existing environment, ensuring the architecture, lighting, and background elements remain identical to the original scene.

items.label: Aerial view
items.prompt: Transition to a high-altitude aerial view. Reinterpret the original environment's layout from above, keeping all landmarks, colors, and lighting consistent with the source image.

items.label: Low-angle
items.prompt: Move the camera to a low-angle ground position. Keep the environment identical but show more of the sky or ceiling, ensuring the subject and background maintain their established relationship and scale.

items.label: Soft Azure Drift
items.prompt: relight with gentle soft blue lighting emanating from the upper right corner

items.label: Dramatic Slats
items.prompt: Relight the image with a strong directional light source from the bottom left, creating distinct shadows and casting linear shadows on the background

items.label: Amber Sideglow
items.prompt: relight with noticeable warm amber daylight emanating from the right side

items.label: Shadow Fade Mystery
items.prompt: add soft, warm lighting from the right side that gradually fades to shadows on the left, creating a dim, mysterious atmosphere with gentle gradients from light to dark

items.label: High-Top Backlight
items.prompt: Relight the image with a strong backlight like lighting from the top

items.label: Soft Foggy Bloom
items.prompt: Relight the scene with a soft, diffused foggy glow emanating from the top left side

items.label: Dim Silver Moon
items.prompt: relight with dim silver moonlight coming from the top right

items.label: Dappled Canopy
items.prompt: add dappled sunlight filtered through leaves from the top creating the shadows, source out of the scene

items.label: Subtle Cool Bloom
items.prompt: relight with a subtle cool white glow from the right side, source off-camera

items.label: Warm Hearth Flicker
items.prompt: relight with flickering warm orange light from the bottom center, source out of frame

items.label: Sharp Cool Burst
items.prompt: add a sharp burst of cool white light from the upper left, source off-camera

items.label: Golden Doorway Glow
items.prompt: add a warm yellow glow coming through a doorway from the side, source out of frame

items.label: Faint Moon Hue
items.prompt: relight with a faint desaturated blue moonlight from the top left, source out of frame

items.label: Neutral Studio Soft
items.prompt: relight with soft neutral white studio lighting from the top left, source out of frame

items.label: Golden Rim Halo
items.prompt: add a strong golden hour backlight, creating a glowing outline, source off-camera

items.label: Blue-Magenta Split
items.prompt: relight with a mix of cool blue and deep magenta light from opposite sides, source off-camera

items.label: Low-Key Beam
items.prompt: add low-key dramatic lighting with a narrow beam of light from the side, source out of frame

items.label: Harsh Top-Down Noir
items.prompt: relight with a harsh cool white top-down light, source off-camera, heavy shadows

items.label: Dawn Flare
items.prompt: relight with a low-angle warm orange sunrise from the horizon, long soft shadows, hazy morning glow, source out of frame.

items.label: Amber Beams
items.prompt: relight with warm volumetric light beams from the top right, hazy atmosphere, source out of frame.

items.label: Teal-Orange Mix
items.prompt: relight with a teal ambient fill and a warm orange key light from the opposite side, classic cinematic color grade, source out of frame.

items.label: Deep Kicker
items.prompt: add a strong cool white kicker light from the back-left, grazing the edges of the subject, deep shadows in front, source out of frame.

items.label: Cross Light
items.prompt: relight with two opposing light sources from the left and right sides, high contrast, creating a bright central highlight, source out of frame.

items.label: Cold Fill
items.prompt: add a subtle desaturated cold blue fill light to the shadow areas, keeping the main light warm, professional color contrast, source out of frame.

items.label: Vignette Rim
items.prompt: add a sharp white rim light from the back-right, separating the subject from a dark background, source out of frame.

items.label: Velvet Shadow
items.prompt: relight with low-intensity soft light from the top, creating deep velvet-like shadows and subtle highlights on top surfaces, source out of frame.

items.label: 35mm
items.prompt: Change style to a grainy 35mm film photograph, shot on Kodak Portra 400, vintage aesthetic, natural colors.

items.label: Polaroid
items.prompt: Change style to an authentic 1980s Polaroid photo, faded edges, soft focus, square format with white border.

items.label: NatGeo
items.prompt: Change style to a raw documentary photograph, high-detail texture, natural sunlight, National Geographic aesthetic.

items.label: 3D Render
items.prompt: Change style to a clean 3D isometric render, soft clay-like textures, pastel color palette, Octane Render, studio lighting.

items.label: Oil Paint
items.prompt: Change style to a classical oil painting, thick impasto brushstrokes, rich canvas texture, dramatic chiaroscuro.

items.label: VHS
items.prompt: Change style to a 1990s VHS recording, tracking lines, chromatic aberration, low resolution, analog video glitch.

items.label: Portrait
items.prompt: Change style to a high-end studio portrait, dramatic Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, sharp focus on eyes, 8k professional photography.

items.label: Sketch
items.prompt: Change style to a detailed graphite pencil sketch on textured paper, hand-drawn strokes, cross-hatching, artistic shading.

items.label: Digicam
items.prompt: Change style to a 2000s consumer digital camera photo, overexposed flash, slight motion blur, dated date stamp in right corner "01-08-2002", low dynamic range.

items.label: Impressionist
items.prompt: Change style to impressionist painting, vibrant dappled light, short thick brushstrokes, focus on light's movement, Monet-inspired palette.

items.label: Double Exp
items.prompt: Change style to a double exposure photograph, blending the subject with a lush forest landscape, surreal overlays, ethereal atmosphere.

items.label: Gothic
items.prompt: Change style to a dark moody gothic aesthetic, desaturated colors, misty atmosphere, sharp contrast, cinematic shadows.

items.label: Ukiyo-e
items.prompt: Change style to traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, flat colors, bold outlines, decorative patterns, antique paper texture.

items.label: Charcoal
items.prompt: Change style to a rough charcoal drawing, smudged textures, heavy dark strokes, expressive hand-drawn feel on textured canvas.

items.label: Marble
items.prompt: Change style to a classical marble sculpture, smooth white stone texture, fine chiseled details, soft museum spotlighting.

items.label: Watercolor
items.prompt: Change style to a delicate watercolor painting, soft pigment bleeds, wet-on-wet technique, hand-painted on cold-press paper.

items.label: Daguerreotype
items.prompt: Change style to an 1800s daguerreotype, antique silver plate texture, sepia tones, heavy scratches, blurred edges, historical look.

items.label: Embroidery
items.prompt: Change style to detailed needlepoint embroidery, textured silk threads, hand-stitched patterns, fabric canvas texture.

items.label: Claymation
items.prompt: Change style to a stop-motion claymation figure, handmade plasticine texture, thumbprint details, studio macro lighting.

items.label: Low Poly
items.prompt: Change style to a low-poly geometric art, sharp triangular facets, flat shading, minimalist 3D aesthetic.

items.label: Vector Art
items.prompt: Change style to clean flat vector illustration, geometric shapes, bold solid colors, minimalist digital art.

items.label: 16-Bit Pixel
items.prompt: Change style to 16-bit retro pixel art, limited color palette, clean sprites, nostalgic SNES aesthetic.

items.label: Enhance
items.prompt: Enhance the overall image quality by restoring fine details and sharpening the focus. Remove all types of blur, including motion and lens blur, while preserving the original features, textures, and likeness. Increase clarity and micro-contrast without introducing artifacts, ensuring a clean, high-definition result that stays true to the source.

items.label: Text edit
items.prompt: Replace the existing text "[OLD TEXT]" with the new text "[NEW TEXT]" in the image. Replicate the exact typography, font family, letter shapes, color palette, effects, and texturing of the original text perfectly. Maintain the exact same position, scale, and alignment within the scene.

items.label: Try-on
items.prompt: Using Image 1 as the subject reference and Image 2 as the outfit reference: Modify only the clothing of the person from Image 1, completely replacing it with the exact outfit, style, textures, materials, and colors shown in Image 2. Retain the exact face, identity, hair, expression, pose, and background from Image 1. Conform the new clothing from Image 2 realistically to the subject's body shape and the lighting environment of Image 1. Maintain the original camera framing.

items.label: Texture transfer
items.prompt: Using Image 1 as the subject and geometry reference, and Image 2 as the texture and material reference: Completely replace the surface material of the subject in Image 1 with the exact tactile texture, pattern, and material characteristics shown in Image 2. Conform the new texture perfectly to the 3D contours, shapes, curves, and lighting of Image 1. Maintain the original face, pose, anatomy, and background from Image 1 perfectly.

items.label: Sketch to photo
items.prompt: Transform this sketch into a hyper-realistic photographic scene. Interpret the lines as real-world objects with high-quality textures, cinematic lighting, and natural shadows. Maintain the original composition while adding depth, realistic materials, and 8k resolution details.

items.label: Collage to scene
items.prompt: Transform this image collage into a cohesive, fully realized and unified scene. Seamlessly blend all the disparate elements into a singular, logical style, strictly maintaining the exact spatial arrangement and relative composition of the original collage while logically generating the missing environment, shadows, and context to naturally connect all objects. Scene Description: [Specify the overall art style or level of realism, the new specific lighting conditions, background environment setting, and overall mood here]

items.label: Edit masked area
items.prompt: Edit the masked area: [DESCRIBE THE CHANGE — add, remove, replace, or modify the content]. Seamlessly blend with the surrounding scene, preserving the original lighting, shadows, depth of field, and photo grain.

items.label: Extend composition
items.prompt: Extend the composition of this image. Replace all black or empty spaces with a logical continuation of the background and foreground. Ensure the transition is invisible and the new elements perfectly match the perspective and color palette of the original image. Scene description: [briefly describe what should appear in the expanded areas]

categories.cat: FACE SWAP (make sure you have a Faceswap LoRA selected in Settings)

items.label: Head swap
items.prompt: Replace the head in image 1 with the head from image 2, adapting the facial features to match the artistic style, focus, and environmental lighting of the image 1.
